creator: bbtruk@users.sourceforge.net
text:
This new patch brings the following changes:
- Fix dependency list so it builds without problems
- Update the port to latest version (0.5.4)
- Make use of options to chose between QT and GTK, thanks to the new
slave ports from Lazarus


Redports buildarchives (revision 4163):
http://redports.org/buildarchive/20120603184629-20290/
http://redports.org/buildarchive/20120603203514-80626/
